\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{Average Compilation Time (seconds). QTPU returns a Pareto frontier while QAC returns a single solution.}
\label{tab:compile-time}
\begin{tabular}{lrrrr}
\toprule
 & \multicolumn{3}{c}{Circuit Size (qubits)} & \\
\cmidrule(lr){2-4}
Benchmark & 20 & 50 & 100 & Avg \\
\midrule
\textbf{QAC} & 2.79 & 13.93 & 36.15 & 17.63 \\
\textbf{QTPU} & 0.59 & 1.09 & 1.85 & 1.18 \\
\midrule
Speedup & 4.7$\times$ & 12.7$\times$ & 19.6$\times$ & \textbf{15.0$\times$} \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\vspace{1mm}
\footnotesize{$^*$QAC faster for simple circuits; QTPU provides richer output (Pareto frontier)}
\end{table}

\begin{table}[t]
